description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image `registry.gitlab.com/pierreduchemin/save-diamond/gradle-openjfx-7zip` and sets the variable `GRADLE_OPTS` to `-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false`. Define three stages — build, test, and release — and a global `before_script` that exports `GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle`. In the build stage add a `build` job that caches the `build` and `.gradle` directories with a push policy keyed by `$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME`, then runs `gradle --build-cache assemble`. In the test stage add a `test` job that pulls the same cache and runs `gradle check`. In the release stage add a `release` job that runs only for Git tags, executes `gradle jfxJar` followed by `jarsigner -keystore src/main/deploy/keystore.jks -storepass "$SAVE_DIAMOND_STOREPASS" build/jfx/app/save-diamond.jar save-diamond -tsa http://timestamp.comodoca.com`, and stores `build/jfx/app` as an artifact.
